data.name: Hentai Li Mei
data.detailed_description:
📚 Hentai Li Mei — a seductive librarian who hides more in her gaze and movements than any book on the shelf. Piece by piece, assemble her puzzles and let your imagination strip away her layers of mystery.



Each level reveals her anew, becoming even more sensual as the puzzle shatters into smaller fragments. You will uncover not only the picture, but also your own growing desire to reach the end.


🔞 Game Features:
💋 30 passionate levels — from tender portraits to daring scenes with Li Mei.
🏆 30 achievements — each victory brings you closer to her.
🖼️ Gallery — revisit the completed images anytime you wish.


🎯 Three difficulty modes:

  • Easy — large pieces, quick access to her charm.

  • Normal — more details, more temptation.

  • Hard — dozens of tiny fragments, slow and sweet unveiling of her image.


Li Mei is your puzzle-enigma. Assemble her again and again, savoring every moment.

data.short_description: Hentai Li Mei — a sultry librarian whose every glance and move drives you wild. Step by step, you’ll uncover her secrets, undressing her with your eyes and savoring each moment of her irresistible allure.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 匈牙利文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
